content: Cognee cognify/add hangs are documented (GH #1743 macOS Kqueue selector hang; #2119 hangs with local OpenAI-compatible LLM due to test_llm_connection() SDK key-format validation). No known equivalent 1.2.2-specific hang report found; hang risk mitigated by using real OpenAI key (not local LLM) and testing on a tiny fixture first via /health/cognee.
